motion_system: Pressure arcs and cable-seams imply a slow hand-drawn sweep across layered paper, with small registration offsets suggesting remote machines waking behind the wall.
color_drift: Warm off-white and graphite paper base drifting into cyan monitor glow, violet-magenta paint residue, acid-green flecks, and small orange tool accents.
glow_behavior: Cool light leaks from buried rectangular tears and glossy print edges, strongest in two hero apertures and softer around smaller pasted fragments.
